top_signals.title: Bond Trader Bets on Fed Hike Poised for Gut Check From Jobs Data
top_signals.summary: Bond traders are looking to a key jobs report this week to confirm their wagers that the US economy is strong enough to push the Federal Reserve to lift interest rates by next year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
